metadata.description: Navigate to any adoptable dog's profile, click Start Your Inquiry, and complete the adopter profile creation form — verifying the CreateAdopterProfile mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Petfinder, start the process of submitting an adoption inquiry for any adoptable dog. When prompted, complete the adopter profile creation form with your details to proceed.
